title: a11y grap: explicit hwnd is authoritative in FindByMultiField
desc: When grap pattern contains {hwnd:0x...} plus proc/title/cls hints, the hwnd is authoritative: IsWindow(hwnd) only, no AND-match on other fields. Fields drift across hot-swap rename, Chrome navigations, and dynamic dialog titles -- any drift used to drop the match to empty and caller fell through to closest-match enumeration, returning a wrong sibling popup on Hero4/HeroGlobal with 4+ #32770 dialogs.
steps: If grap dict has hwnd field and IsWindow(hwnd) returns the single WindowInfo (no AND-match on other fields)
Prior behavior AND-matched pid/title/cls/proc/domain/url/cmd -- any drift returned empty list
Empty result let callers enumerate and pick closest match (often wrong sibling)
Now: hwnd is the truth; other fields are captured hints not constraints
Use this when writing grap from 'a11y find' TARGET line -- the hwnd remains valid across hot-swap
author: claude
